name: [CYOS] Asaba Harumasa | ZZZ
description:
Create Your Own Scenario!

Asaba Harumasa | Zenless Zone Zero | ZZZ

-`✮´-

• Made way before he came out, finally updated it to have proper backstory and explanations for things like his accessories.

For those of you who like my bots but wanna be creative with the story yourself <3

• Thank you to @Solaris for requesting this!

• Put details in the chat memory if you’d like to add some context and backstory!

`✮´-

Enjoy!! Leave reviews and requests below, but no guarantee that I’ll do every request, I mostly just do the ones I find fun or needed.
